top_signals.title: US withdrew forces from Nigeria after operation against ISIS, AFRICOM chief says

top_signals.title: Corn, Soybeans Touch Highest in a Month as Traders Watch Weather
top_signals.summary: Soybean and corn futures jumped Monday as traders turned their attention to weather concerns looming over global crops.
